verses.text: Moab gam tawh kisai thu: Zan khat thu-in Ar khua kisiasak ahih manin Moab gam a bei hi. Zan khat thu-in Kir khua kisiasak ahih manin Moab gam a beita ahi hi
A sangna munte-ah a kap dingin Dibon khuamite paito uh hi. Nebo leh Medeba khuate' hangin Moab mite nakpi takin kap uh hi. Dahna limin lu khempeuh kimettol a, khamul khempeuh zong kimetmai hi
Kongzing lakah amaute in puanhampi silh uh hi. Innkhumzang leh kongzing lampi kituahnate-ah mi khempeuh nakpi-in kapin khitui tawh a kawt uh hi
Heshbon khua leh Elealeh khua kiko uh a, amau' kahna awging Jahaz khua dongah kiza hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moab mi galhiam tawite lau-in nakpi takin kiko uh a, amaute a ling uh hi

Moab gam-a' dingin ka lungsim kiko hi. A galtai ama mite Zoar khua leh Eglathshelishiah khuate-ah a tai uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Luhith lampi-ah amaute a kapsa-in paito uh hi. Horonaim khua zuatna lampi-ah amaute in siatna a thuakna uh hangin nakpi-in kiko uh hi
Nimrim luite kang hi. Lopa keu-in a selthak omlo a, lopa hing om nawnlo hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a ngahsa uh leh a kholsa uh na tampite pua-in Gialhek Lui-ah a paipih uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Moab gam kiim khempeuhah kahna aw a ging hi. Kahna in Eglaim khua ban a, kahna in Beerelim khua zong a ban hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Dibon luituite sisan tawh kidim hi. Ahi zongin Dibon khua in a thuak ding a nasiazaw omlai a, Moab gam panin a suakta mi leh gamsungah a omlai mite khempeuh kithat gawp ding hi.
